VAL-CLI-001.notes: CLI task creation verified working via swell-cli. Task created and returned UUID.

VAL-CLI-002.notes: CLI task listing verified working via swell-cli. Returns JSON array with task details.

VAL-CLI-003.notes: CLI task watch verified working via swell-cli. Returns state transitions.

VAL-CLI-004.notes: CLI task cancel/approve verified working via swell-cli. Cancel transitioned task to FAILED. Approve returned proper error for task without plan.

VAL-DAEMON-001.notes: Daemon Unix socket communication verified working via nc and Python socket testing. TaskCreate and TaskList return correct JSON responses.

VAL-DAEMON-003.notes: Daemon error handling verified - returns structured JSON error responses for invalid commands.

VAL-CROSS-001.notes: End-to-end task execution via CLI now working after cli-fix. Task creation, listing, watching, and cancel all verified.
